title: olearia elaeophila
intro: Olearia elaeophila, also known as the Kaitorete Coast Daisy, is a flowering plant that belongs to the daisy family (Asteraceae) and is native to New Zealand. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Olearia elaeophila include reducing inflammation and fighting off infections, as well as potentially aiding in the treatment of certain skin conditions and wounds. Herbal preparations of Olearia elaeophila are typically made from its leaves and flowers, and can be found in the form of teas, tinctures, and salves.
